subject: Differentiate status and status-teardown testcases
commit_message:
Differentiate status and status-teardown testcases

- this is done to make the test report generation
  script that runs later on less brittle
- without the differentiation the status test that runs before and after the tests
  can only be differentiated by their timestamps

Issue-ID: INT-2366
Change-Id: Ied77b78b6315dc9ab9916d65edd3cc2ce339b2b8
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
